S.FORM: == Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep == Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep (Inkiris: Taiwan Environmental Protection Union,TEPU), polong no ngangan rekadan hocing Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep, rahodayay ngangan Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep ano eca lekatep, o caayay pilipayso a midipotay to taliyok no Taywan a lekatep, nai 1987 miheca 11 folad a patireng i naikoran no pisedal no ka'edesan no Taywan, to hatiniay midemakay to pifelih to kapolongan a makari'angay, pidipotay to taliyok a onto, mifelih to heneng onto ato liyokan a kiwiko. O nia sakapot tangasa i 2008 mihecaan ira ko 13 a laisal no yofayof, i 1987 mihecaan tona patireng ira ko mikingkiway a wiyinhuy pilicayan ato mikingkiway a tayal. Pakayni i patateko to kasaniyaro' a matayalay to pidipot to taliyok a kasakapot, o matanengay a hakasi no daykako, patenak to to sapidipot to taliyok a dademaken, nai kasaniyaro a pico'ay pasayra i matanengay to taliyok a rikec ko picekeroh ato pikantok. Tatokeran a todong. 1.O taliyok a salongoc o nano todongan no tamdaw a salongoc, caay ko kalaliacaan ano eca o pipalasawad; o cacitodong ko finawlan to sapidopot to taliyok a ka'oripan, manga'ay miliyang to misatatiihay to taliyok a sarikec ano eca o halaka, itiya ira ko salongoc miketon ato mikantok to salalomaan no syako a patireng micowat. 2. O tamdaw miingiray to tataparan a taliyok a ma'orip; tataparan a kinaira o mamidaoc a mihadoy, o tamdaw ato tataparan o masasinga'ayay ko masasitadiec a mido'edoo to no syakay, kicay, kaki a macowat pidotocan, nihosyo to pipahapinang to ka'orip no tamdaw. 3.O caconohen no tamdamdaw ko pidipot to taliyokan, caay ka citodong ko kitakit, finacadan, pakayraan ato kasarekarekad a la'isal. O sida'itay ho to taliyok a teked ano eca lekapot, o mamisarocod midipot to mapolongay a patosokan sakapot a midipoh. 4.O Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep o cecay a "risrisay, fanaan, patangsolay" a sakapot, nai pipatireng tahanini midotoc misa'icel micekeroh to pidipot to taliyok a onto, pahalhal a pasafaloco' madipot ko paraparatan no taliyok no Taywan, malowan ko kakadit ato kapeleng no taliyok, patireng to caayay ko heneng a laloma'an ko Taywan, saka ira no rihaday 'orip, someletay, nongkiay, macakatay ko 'orip a serareci midepoc ko ka'oripan a taliyok. Patomiker a dademak ato tayal Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep a mitangican lima'ay a sowal: : 1. Mifelih to heneng a onto, - nai 1988 mihecaan micikeroh to pifelih to heneng a onto, tangasa 2001 miheca to mihecahecaan latek midemak to polong no kitakit mifelih to heneng a romakat. 2. Micikeroh to sapifelih to kari'ang ato madipot ko paraparatan no taliyok a onto, - miliyang to padadahal ato pipatireng a palafokelohay a katayalan, micoracor to "Cilan fahedil koyin no kitakit", mikihatiya midemak to "polong no kitakit NGOs taliyok a lomaoc", misarocod mianinil to temeran a sakadoka', kafafalifalic no romi'ad, picowat to sera a kadademakan. 3.O picikeroh to kakingkiwen a rarekoen ato pipatireng, - pakayni to taliyokan a dadepocen ato kasarareko, rikec, paecasan midemak to pikingkiw pasaheci, ato midemak to kasasowalan, paratohan, paainian pasadak to pa'eses, micikeroh to papatirengen. 4.Mikiwiko a misinting ato nisafaloco'an patenak, - midemak to lekatep mitiliday no daykako ato taliyok no katayalan, patilid i sinponan mirina' to tilid ato hong, misyasing, sapisinting to kafana'en sapidipot to taliyok. 5.Macacawna' ato matatahic no midipotay to taliyok a kasakitakit, - macacorok midemak to " awaayay ko heneng no Asiya a kasasowalan", midemak to "Taywan Dipong finawlan syakay kasasowalan", miocor to mikihatiya to no kasakitakit tadamanay taliyok a lomaocan. Palowad to taliyok solongoc i kimpo Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep nai 1990 mihecaan miteka misarocod to nisafaloco'an aliyok solongoc i kimpo, ira ko pinapina a patodongan: 1. Patireng to awaayay ko heneng a kimpo, mipalasawad a micowat ano eca heneng a sakalalood ato heneng. O tadamaanay no saka awa no heneng a harateng: miliyang to kalalood ato kafolawan, mikilim ro sakarihaday ato masasinga'ayay. 2. Patireng to fa'elohay kimpo i masakowatay no Taywan a pina'orip. 3. O tenatenan salongoc ko taliyok, o papadamaen pa'orip. 4. Sakacowat no kicay o sapipacakat to sakalemed no syakay ato pipa'ading to kinaira a midipoc ko patonekan. 5. O pilitado to taliyok ato kinaira, cisalongoc ko finawlan mikihatiya miketon ato mikantok, saan i, o pitopa no finawlan ko sapiketon. Nikawrira o nian a mikerohan taikor i ko-min-ta-huy mahakeno. Paratatenga ci Se-Sinmin (Shi Xinmin), aniniay a kimpo patongalan a lawot i saka 10 liyad: "O kicay ato kakak a nifana'an a kacowat, o papakapoten i taliyok ato kinaira a madipot a makahirahira" ono kitakit a hapiwan a tatelak, caay ko pidipot to finawlan taliyok a salongoc a liyad, orasaka ano o taliyok a salongoc ko micomoday i kimpo, caay ko dengan o no "kitakit a pasayraan" a pihapiw a pahecian, malatenaan solongoc no finawlan, o sakasongila' to saki finawlan a taliyok salongoc ato pipatadoan hato pidipot no sifo to finawlan taliyok salongoc a tatayalen, o pidemak no sifo o mamaparafac no kimpo, saka parana'an no "taliyok a salongoc" matelek ko nidemakan a halaka, rikec a masongila'. Itiya a palowad to pipacomod i kimpo taliyok a salongoc a lawot a mikeroh, a o midipotay to taliyok a lekatep ato 21 sici mifalicay to kimpo a lekatep ko milingosay to kimpo a tilid: Saka 41 liyad (taliyok): "o kitakit ko papa'ading to saka rihaday, somelet, nongki, serareci midepoc ko ka'oripan to taliyok. Saka 59 liyad (masa liyokay kitakit): "o 'icel no kitakit a mikowan ko saka ira madipot ko rayray ka'oripan ato masongila' ko serareci macowat ko taliyok kasaira a todong" "o kitakit cay picowat to ano eca midemak to henen sakalalood ato heneng a pisadingki, o mami safaloco' to halaka ato pakayraan, tangasa i palasawaday to heneng a laloma'an a patosokan." Misi'ayaw ano o sifo ano eca o finawlan to saki "taliyokan salongoc pacomod i kimpo" a pasadak to kahinapec ano eca o kaoratan, Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep o mamihacecay pasadak to saca'of: pacecay ko Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep, no taliyok a salongoc a dademakan o nia "o taliyok o no kapolongananay, o maanan a makaditay ano eca nikari'angan a taliyok, o todong pikari'ang to dafong no finawlan. Ci salongoc ko finawlan to miliyang ano eca mipalasawad." Itiya, o taliyok a salongoc pacomod i kimpo toya i pahapinangay to salongoc no finawlan ato tatodong, patodong to sifo midipot to finawlan a taliyok a 'icel ato patodong; o taliyok salongoc pacomod i kimpo o pipahapinang to taliyok salongoc a tenatenaan a salongoc, orasaka o saka cipatodongan koni. taliyok salongoc ato kimpo saka 15 liyad a saka 'orip salongoc a kasafaki', itiniay i taloyok salongoc ikaka ko no saka 'orip a salongoc a kasakowat masadadahalay, caay ko dengan o todong no sakafecol, o saka cikangodoan (tari'ang) no finawlan, mapa'orip o teloteloc a wawawawa manga'ay miraoy to marocekaykinaira saka'orip ato nga'ayay saka'orip a taliyok . Kasarekad a kakeridan (kayciw) Shi Xinmin (1987-1989, Patirengay a kakeridan ato saka 2 rekad/2000-2002, saka 13-14 a rekad). Lin Biyao (1989-1990, saka 3 rekad). Zheng Xianyou (1990-1991, saka 4 rekad). Liu Zhicheng (1991-1993, saka 5-6rekad). Zhang Guolong (1993-1994, saka 7rekad, 'ayaway Sincenyin taliyok a midipotaysu kakeridan). Gao Chengyan (1994-1996, saka 8-9rekad, o mikomoday no Litan). Yang Wenheng (1996-1997, saka 10 rekad). Wang Tufa (1997-2000, saka 11-12 rekad, 'ayaway Lifawiyin). Yang Zhaoyue (2002-2003, saka 15 rekad). Guo Jinquan (2003-2004, saka 16rekad). Chen Jiaohua (2004-2006, saka 17-18 rekad, Setayliliang 'ayaway kakomodan, Lifawiyin). Xu Guangrong (2006-2008, saka 19 rekad, Ina romi'adan dademakay lekapot 'ayaway kakeridan). Wang Junxiu (2008-2012, saka 20-21 rekad). Lin Wenyin (2012-2014, saka 22 rekad). Liu Junxiu (2014-2018, saka 23-24 rekad). Liu Zhijian (2018-2022, saka 25-26 rekad). Ye Guoliang (2022-2024, saka 27 rekad). Kasa niyaro' a midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Ka'amisay- Hompo, ka'amisay riyar 'isal lekatep. kawali ka'amisay 'isal lekatep. Yilansien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Taoyinsien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Tenokan- Canghoasien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Yinlin 'isal lekatep. Katimolay- Taynansi midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Takao 'isal lekatep. Pintongsien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Kawaliay- Kalingko 'isal lekatep. Posong 'isal lekatep. Kanatal – Penho 'isal lekatep.
S.PHON: == tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp == tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp (inkiris: taiwan ənb~viro~unməntaɾ pro~utəʦtio~un o~u~unio~un,təpo~u~u), po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ŋaŋan rəkaɬ~ɮan ħo~uʦiŋ tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp, raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ŋaŋan tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp ano~u əʦa ɾəkatəp, o~u ʦaajaj piɾipajso~u a miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk no~u tajwan a ɾəkatəp, nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a patirəŋ i naiko~uran no~u pisəɬ~ɮaɾ no~u kaʡəɬ~ɮəsan no~u tajwan, to~u ħatiniaj miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u pifəɾiħ to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan a makariʡaŋaj, piɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a o~unto~u, mifəɾiħ to~u ħənəŋ o~unto~u ato~u ɾijo~ukan a kiwiko~u. o~u nia sakapo~ut taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan ira ko~u ** a ɾaisaɾ no~u jo~ufajo~uf, i **** miħəʦaan to~una patirəŋ ira ko~u mikiŋkiwaj a wijinħo~u~uj piɾiʦajan ato~u mikiŋkiwaj a tajaɾ. pakajni i patatəko~u to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a matajaɾaj to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a kasakapo~ut, o~u matanəŋaj a ħakasi no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u, patənak to~u to~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, nai kasanijaro~u a piʦo~uʡaj pasajra i matanəŋaj to~u taɾijo~uk a rikəʦ ko~u piʦəkəro~uħ ato~u pikanto~uk. tato~ukəran a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. *.o~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ o~u nano~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, ʦaaj ko~u kaɾaɾiaʦaan ano~u əʦa o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; o~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan to~u sapiɬ~ɮo~upo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a kaʡo~uripan, maŋaʡaj miɾijaŋ to~u misatatiiħaj to~u taɾijo~uk a sarikəʦ ano~u əʦa o~u ħaɾaka, itija ira ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ mikəto~un ato~u mikanto~uk to~u saɾaɾo~umaan no~u sjako~u a patirəŋ miʦo~uwat. *. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw miiŋiraj to~u tataparan a taɾijo~uk a maʡo~urip; tataparan a kinaira o~u mamiɬ~ɮao~uʦ a miħaɬ~ɮo~uj, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tataparan o~u masasiŋaʡajaj ko~u masasitaɬ~ɮiəʦ a miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uo~u to~u no~u sjakaj, kiʦaj, kaki a maʦo~uwat piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan, niħo~usjo~u to~u pipaħapinaŋ to~u kaʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. *.o~u ʦaʦo~uno~uħən no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~ukan, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u kitakit, finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pakajraan ato~u kasarəkarəkaɬ~ɮ a ɾaʡisaɾ. o~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj ħo~u to~u taɾijo~uk a təkəɬ~ɮ ano~u əʦa ɾəkapo~ut, o~u mamisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u mapo~uɾo~uŋaj a pato~uso~ukan sakapo~ut a miɬ~ɮipo~uħ. *.o~u tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp o~u ʦəʦaj a "risrisaj, fanaan, pataŋso~uɾaj" a sakapo~ut, nai pipatirəŋ taħanini miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ miʦəkəro~uħ to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a o~unto~u, paħaɾħaɾ a pasafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ maɬ~ɮipo~ut ko~u paraparatan no~u taɾijo~uk no~u tajwan, maɾo~uwan ko~u kakaɬ~ɮit ato~u kapəɾəŋ no~u taɾijo~uk, patirəŋ to~u ʦaajaj ko~u ħənəŋ a ɾaɾo~umaʡan ko~u tajwan, saka ira no~u riħaɬ~ɮaj ʡo~urip, so~uməɾətaj, no~uŋkiaj, maʦakataj ko~u ʡo~urip a sərarəʦi miɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ ko~u kaʡo~uripan a taɾijo~uk. pato~umikər a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ato~u tajaɾ tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp a mitaŋiʦan ɾimaʡaj a so~uwaɾ: : *. mifəɾiħ to~u ħənəŋ a o~unto~u, - nai **** miħəʦaan miʦikəro~uħ to~u pifəɾiħ to~u ħənəŋ a o~unto~u, taŋasa **** miħəʦa to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan ɾatək miɬ~ɮəmak to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit mifəɾiħ to~u ħənəŋ a ro~umakat. *. miʦikəro~uħ to~u sapifəɾiħ to~u kariʡaŋ ato~u maɬ~ɮipo~ut ko~u paraparatan no~u taɾijo~uk a o~unto~u, - miɾijaŋ to~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ ato~u pipatirəŋ a paɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj a katajaɾan, miʦo~uraʦo~ur to~u "ʦiɾan faħəɬ~ɮiɾ ko~ujin no~u kitakit", mikiħatija miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit n*o~us taɾijo~uk a ɾo~umao~uʦ", misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ mianiniɾ to~u təməran a sakaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ, kafafaɾifaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, piʦo~uwat to~u səra a kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan. *.o~u piʦikəro~uħ to~u kakiŋkiwən a rarəko~uən ato~u pipatirəŋ, - pakajni to~u taɾijo~ukan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəpo~uʦən ato~u kasararəko~u, rikəʦ, paəʦasan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u pikiŋkiw pasaħəʦi, ato~u miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kasaso~uwaɾan, parato~uħan, paainian pasaɬ~ɮak to~u paʡəsəs, miʦikəro~uħ to~u papatirəŋən. *.mikiwiko~u a misintiŋ ato~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan patənak, - miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɾəkatəp mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u taɾijo~uk no~u katajaɾan, patiɾiɬ~ɮ i sinpo~unan mirinaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u ħo~uŋ, misjasiŋ, sapisintiŋ to~u kafanaʡən sapiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk. *.maʦaʦawnaʡ ato~u matataħiʦ no~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a kasakitakit, - maʦaʦo~uro~uk miɬ~ɮəmak to~u " awaajaj ko~u ħənəŋ no~u asija a kasaso~uwaɾan", miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "tajwan ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ finawɾan sjakaj kasaso~uwaɾan", mio~uʦo~ur to~u mikiħatija to~u no~u kasakitakit taɬ~ɮamanaj taɾijo~uk a ɾo~umao~uʦan. paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u taɾijo~uk so~uɾo~uŋo~uʦ i kimpo~u tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp nai **** miħəʦaan mitəka misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan aɾijo~uk so~uɾo~uŋo~uʦ i kimpo~u, ira ko~u pinapina a pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan: *. patirəŋ to~u awaajaj ko~u ħənəŋ a kimpo~u, mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ a miʦo~uwat ano~u əʦa ħənəŋ a sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ħənəŋ. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u saka awa no~u ħənəŋ a ħaratəŋ: miɾijaŋ to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u kafo~uɾawan, mikiɾim ro~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj ato~u masasiŋaʡajaj. *. patirəŋ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kimpo~u i masako~uwataj no~u tajwan a pinaʡo~urip. *. o~u tənatənan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u taɾijo~uk, o~u papaɬ~ɮamaən paʡo~urip. *. sakaʦo~uwat no~u kiʦaj o~u sapipaʦakat to~u sakaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj ato~u pipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u kinaira a miɬ~ɮipo~uʦ ko~u pato~unəkan. *. o~u piɾitaɬ~ɮo~u to~u taɾijo~uk ato~u kinaira, ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u finawɾan mikiħatija mikəto~un ato~u mikanto~uk, saan i, o~u pito~upa no~u finawɾan ko~u sapikəto~un. nikawrira o~u nian a mikəro~uħan taiko~ur i ko~u-min-ta-ħo~u~uj maħakəno~u. paratatəŋa ʦi sə-sinmin (sħi xinmin), aniniaj a kimpo~u pato~uŋaɾan a ɾawo~ut i saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ: "o~u kiʦaj ato~u kakak a nifanaʡan a kaʦo~uwat, o~u papakapo~utən i taɾijo~uk ato~u kinaira a maɬ~ɮipo~ut a makaħiraħira" o~uno~u kitakit a ħapiwan a tatəɾak, ʦaaj ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~urasaka ano~u o~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj i kimpo~u, ʦaaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u no~u "kitakit a pasajraan" a piħapiw a paħəʦian, maɾatənaan so~uɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan, o~u sakaso~uŋiɾaʡ to~u saki finawɾan a taɾijo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ato~u pipataɬ~ɮo~uan ħato~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u sifo~u to~u finawɾan taɾijo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a tatajaɾən, o~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u sifo~u o~u mamaparafaʦ no~u kimpo~u, saka paranaʡan no~u "taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ" matəɾək ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a ħaɾaka, rikəʦ a maso~uŋiɾaʡ. itija a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kimpo~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ɾawo~ut a mikəro~uħ, a o~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp ato~u ** siʦi mifaɾiʦaj to~u kimpo~u a ɾəkatəp ko~u miɾiŋo~usaj to~u kimpo~u a tiɾiɬ~ɮ: saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ (taɾijo~uk): "o~u kitakit ko~u papaʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u saka riħaɬ~ɮaj, so~uməɾət, no~uŋki, sərarəʦi miɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ ko~u kaʡo~uripan to~u taɾijo~uk. saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ (masa ɾijo~ukaj kitakit): "o~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kitakit a miko~uwan ko~u saka ira maɬ~ɮipo~ut ko~u rajraj kaʡo~uripan ato~u maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u sərarəʦi maʦo~uwat ko~u taɾijo~uk kasaira a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ" "o~u kitakit ʦaj piʦo~uwat to~u ano~u əʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ħənən sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ħənəŋ a pisaɬ~ɮiŋki, o~u mami safaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ħaɾaka ato~u pakajraan, taŋasa i paɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u ħənəŋ a ɾaɾo~umaʡan a pato~uso~ukan." misiʡajaw ano~u o~u sifo~u ano~u əʦa o~u finawɾan to~u saki "taɾijo~ukan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kimpo~u" a pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kaħinapəʦ ano~u əʦa o~u kao~uratan, tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp o~u mamiħaʦəʦaj pasaɬ~ɮak to~u saʦaʡo~uf: paʦəʦaj ko~u tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp, no~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan o~u nia "o~u taɾijo~uk o~u no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋananaj, o~u maanan a makaɬ~ɮitaj ano~u əʦa nikariʡaŋan a taɾijo~uk, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pikariʡaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u finawɾan. ʦi saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u finawɾan to~u miɾijaŋ ano~u əʦa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ." itija, o~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kimpo~u to~uja i paħapinaŋaj to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan ato~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sifo~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan a taɾijo~uk a ʡiʦəɾ ato~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ; o~u taɾijo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kimpo~u o~u pipaħapinaŋ to~u taɾijo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a tənatənaan a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, o~urasaka o~u saka ʦipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ko~uni. taɾijo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ato~u kimpo~u saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a saka ʡo~urip saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a kasafakiʡ, itiniaj i taɾo~ujo~uk saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ikaka ko~u no~u saka ʡo~urip a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a kasako~uwat masaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj, ʦaaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u sakafəʦo~uɾ, o~u saka ʦikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uan (tariʡaŋ) no~u finawɾan, mapaʡo~urip o~u təɾo~utəɾo~uʦ a wawawawa maŋaʡaj mirao~uj to~u maro~uʦəkajkinaira sakaʡo~urip ato~u ŋaʡajaj sakaʡo~urip a taɾijo~uk . kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a kakəriɬ~ɮan (kajʦiw) sħi xinmin (****-****, patirəŋaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ/****-****, saka **-** a rəkaɬ~ɮ). ɾin b~b~vijao~u (****-****, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ). *ħəŋ xianjo~uo~u~u (****-****, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ). ɾio~u~u *ħiʦħəŋ (****-****, saka *-*rəkaɬ~ɮ). *ħaŋ *o~u~uo~uɾo~uŋ (****-****, saka *rəkaɬ~ɮ, ʡajawaj sinʦənjin taɾijo~uk a miɬ~ɮipo~utajso~u~u kakəriɬ~ɮan). *ao~u ʦħəŋjan (****-****, saka *-*rəkaɬ~ɮ, o~u miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u ɾitan). jaŋ wənħəŋ (****-****, saka ** *o~u~uo~uɾiaŋ (****-****, saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ). kasa nijaro~uʡ a miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp. kaʡamisaj- ħo~umpo~u, kaʡamisaj rijar ʡisaɾ ɾəkatəp. kawaɾi kaʡamisaj ʡisaɾ ɾəkatəp. jiɾansiən S.FORM: == Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep == Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep (Inkiris: Taiwan Environmental Protection Union,TEPU), polong no ngangan rekadan hocing Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep, rahodayay ngangan Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep ano eca lekatep, o caayay pilipayso a midipotay to taliyok no Taywan a lekatep, nai 1987 miheca 11 folad a patireng i naikoran no pisedal no ka'edesan no Taywan, to hatiniay midemakay to pifelih to kapolongan a makari'angay, pidipotay to taliyok a onto, mifelih to heneng onto ato liyokan a kiwiko. O nia sakapot tangasa i 2008 mihecaan ira ko 13 a laisal no yofayof, i 1987 mihecaan tona patireng ira ko mikingkiway a wiyinhuy pilicayan ato mikingkiway a tayal. Pakayni i patateko to kasaniyaro' a matayalay to pidipot to taliyok a kasakapot, o matanengay a hakasi no daykako, patenak to to sapidipot to taliyok a dademaken, nai kasaniyaro a pico'ay pasayra i matanengay to taliyok a rikec ko picekeroh ato pikantok. Tatokeran a todong. 1.O taliyok a salongoc o nano todongan no tamdaw a salongoc, caay ko kalaliacaan ano eca o pipalasawad; o cacitodong ko finawlan to sapidopot to taliyok a ka'oripan, manga'ay miliyang to misatatiihay to taliyok a sarikec ano eca o halaka, itiya ira ko salongoc miketon ato mikantok to salalomaan no syako a patireng micowat. 2. O tamdaw miingiray to tataparan a taliyok a ma'orip; tataparan a kinaira o mamidaoc a mihadoy, o tamdaw ato tataparan o masasinga'ayay ko masasitadiec a mido'edoo to no syakay, kicay, kaki a macowat pidotocan, nihosyo to pipahapinang to ka'orip no tamdaw. 3.O caconohen no tamdamdaw ko pidipot to taliyokan, caay ka citodong ko kitakit, finacadan, pakayraan ato kasarekarekad a la'isal. O sida'itay ho to taliyok a teked ano eca lekapot, o mamisarocod midipot to mapolongay a patosokan sakapot a midipoh. 4.O Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep o cecay a "risrisay, fanaan, patangsolay" a sakapot, nai pipatireng tahanini midotoc misa'icel micekeroh to pidipot to taliyok a onto, pahalhal a pasafaloco' madipot ko paraparatan no taliyok no Taywan, malowan ko kakadit ato kapeleng no taliyok, patireng to caayay ko heneng a laloma'an ko Taywan, saka ira no rihaday 'orip, someletay, nongkiay, macakatay ko 'orip a serareci midepoc ko ka'oripan a taliyok. Patomiker a dademak ato tayal Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep a mitangican lima'ay a sowal: : 1. Mifelih to heneng a onto, - nai 1988 mihecaan micikeroh to pifelih to heneng a onto, tangasa 2001 miheca to mihecahecaan latek midemak to polong no kitakit mifelih to heneng a romakat. 2. Micikeroh to sapifelih to kari'ang ato madipot ko paraparatan no taliyok a onto, - miliyang to padadahal ato pipatireng a palafokelohay a katayalan, micoracor to "Cilan fahedil koyin no kitakit", mikihatiya midemak to "polong no kitakit NGOs taliyok a lomaoc", misarocod mianinil to temeran a sakadoka', kafafalifalic no romi'ad, picowat to sera a kadademakan. 3.O picikeroh to kakingkiwen a rarekoen ato pipatireng, - pakayni to taliyokan a dadepocen ato kasarareko, rikec, paecasan midemak to pikingkiw pasaheci, ato midemak to kasasowalan, paratohan, paainian pasadak to pa'eses, micikeroh to papatirengen. 4.Mikiwiko a misinting ato nisafaloco'an patenak, - midemak to lekatep mitiliday no daykako ato taliyok no katayalan, patilid i sinponan mirina' to tilid ato hong, misyasing, sapisinting to kafana'en sapidipot to taliyok. 5.Macacawna' ato matatahic no midipotay to taliyok a kasakitakit, - macacorok midemak to " awaayay ko heneng no Asiya a kasasowalan", midemak to "Taywan Dipong finawlan syakay kasasowalan", miocor to mikihatiya to no kasakitakit tadamanay taliyok a lomaocan. Palowad to taliyok solongoc i kimpo Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep nai 1990 mihecaan miteka misarocod to nisafaloco'an aliyok solongoc i kimpo, ira ko pinapina a patodongan: 1. Patireng to awaayay ko heneng a kimpo, mipalasawad a micowat ano eca heneng a sakalalood ato heneng. O tadamaanay no saka awa no heneng a harateng: miliyang to kalalood ato kafolawan, mikilim ro sakarihaday ato masasinga'ayay. 2. Patireng to fa'elohay kimpo i masakowatay no Taywan a pina'orip. 3. O tenatenan salongoc ko taliyok, o papadamaen pa'orip. 4. Sakacowat no kicay o sapipacakat to sakalemed no syakay ato pipa'ading to kinaira a midipoc ko patonekan. 5. O pilitado to taliyok ato kinaira, cisalongoc ko finawlan mikihatiya miketon ato mikantok, saan i, o pitopa no finawlan ko sapiketon. Nikawrira o nian a mikerohan taikor i ko-min-ta-huy mahakeno. Paratatenga ci Se-Sinmin (Shi Xinmin), aniniay a kimpo patongalan a lawot i saka 10 liyad: "O kicay ato kakak a nifana'an a kacowat, o papakapoten i taliyok ato kinaira a madipot a makahirahira" ono kitakit a hapiwan a tatelak, caay ko pidipot to finawlan taliyok a salongoc a liyad, orasaka ano o taliyok a salongoc ko micomoday i kimpo, caay ko dengan o no "kitakit a pasayraan" a pihapiw a pahecian, malatenaan solongoc no finawlan, o sakasongila' to saki finawlan a taliyok salongoc ato pipatadoan hato pidipot no sifo to finawlan taliyok salongoc a tatayalen, o pidemak no sifo o mamaparafac no kimpo, saka parana'an no "taliyok a salongoc" matelek ko nidemakan a halaka, rikec a masongila'. Itiya a palowad to pipacomod i kimpo taliyok a salongoc a lawot a mikeroh, a o midipotay to taliyok a lekatep ato 21 sici mifalicay to kimpo a lekatep ko milingosay to kimpo a tilid: Saka 41 liyad (taliyok): "o kitakit ko papa'ading to saka rihaday, somelet, nongki, serareci midepoc ko ka'oripan to taliyok. Saka 59 liyad (masa liyokay kitakit): "o 'icel no kitakit a mikowan ko saka ira madipot ko rayray ka'oripan ato masongila' ko serareci macowat ko taliyok kasaira a todong" "o kitakit cay picowat to ano eca midemak to henen sakalalood ato heneng a pisadingki, o mami safaloco' to halaka ato pakayraan, tangasa i palasawaday to heneng a laloma'an a patosokan." Misi'ayaw ano o sifo ano eca o finawlan to saki "taliyokan salongoc pacomod i kimpo" a pasadak to kahinapec ano eca o kaoratan, Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep o mamihacecay pasadak to saca'of: pacecay ko Taywan midipotay to taliyok a lekatep, no taliyok a salongoc a dademakan o nia "o taliyok o no kapolongananay, o maanan a makaditay ano eca nikari'angan a taliyok, o todong pikari'ang to dafong no finawlan. Ci salongoc ko finawlan to miliyang ano eca mipalasawad." Itiya, o taliyok a salongoc pacomod i kimpo toya i pahapinangay to salongoc no finawlan ato tatodong, patodong to sifo midipot to finawlan a taliyok a 'icel ato patodong; o taliyok salongoc pacomod i kimpo o pipahapinang to taliyok salongoc a tenatenaan a salongoc, orasaka o saka cipatodongan koni. taliyok salongoc ato kimpo saka 15 liyad a saka 'orip salongoc a kasafaki', itiniay i taloyok salongoc ikaka ko no saka 'orip a salongoc a kasakowat masadadahalay, caay ko dengan o todong no sakafecol, o saka cikangodoan (tari'ang) no finawlan, mapa'orip o teloteloc a wawawawa manga'ay miraoy to marocekaykinaira saka'orip ato nga'ayay saka'orip a taliyok . Kasarekad a kakeridan (kayciw) Shi Xinmin (1987-1989, Patirengay a kakeridan ato saka 2 rekad/2000-2002, saka 13-14 a rekad). Lin Biyao (1989-1990, saka 3 rekad). Zheng Xianyou (1990-1991, saka 4 rekad). Liu Zhicheng (1991-1993, saka 5-6rekad). Zhang Guolong (1993-1994, saka 7rekad, 'ayaway Sincenyin taliyok a midipotaysu kakeridan). Gao Chengyan (1994-1996, saka 8-9rekad, o mikomoday no Litan). Yang Wenheng (1996-1997, saka 10 rekad). Wang Tufa (1997-2000, saka 11-12 rekad, 'ayaway Lifawiyin). Yang Zhaoyue (2002-2003, saka 15 rekad). Guo Jinquan (2003-2004, saka 16rekad). Chen Jiaohua (2004-2006, saka 17-18 rekad, Setayliliang 'ayaway kakomodan, Lifawiyin). Xu Guangrong (2006-2008, saka 19 rekad, Ina romi'adan dademakay lekapot 'ayaway kakeridan). Wang Junxiu (2008-2012, saka 20-21 rekad). Lin Wenyin (2012-2014, saka 22 rekad). Liu Junxiu (2014-2018, saka 23-24 rekad). Liu Zhijian (2018-2022, saka 25-26 rekad). Ye Guoliang (2022-2024, saka 27 rekad). Kasa niyaro' a midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Ka'amisay- Hompo, ka'amisay riyar 'isal lekatep. kawali ka'amisay 'isal lekatep. Yilansien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Taoyinsien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Tenokan- Canghoasien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Yinlin 'isal lekatep. Katimolay- Taynansi midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Takao 'isal lekatep. Pintongsien midipotay to taliyok a lekatep. Kawaliay- Kalingko 'isal lekatep. Posong 'isal lekatep. Kanatal – Penho 'isal lekatep.
S.PHON: == tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp == tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp (inkiris: taiwan ənb~viro~unməntaɾ pro~utəʦtio~un o~u~unio~un,təpo~u~u), po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ŋaŋan rəkaɬ~ɮan ħo~uʦiŋ tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp, raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ŋaŋan tajwan miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a ɾəkatəp ano~u əʦa ɾəkatəp, o~u ʦaajaj piɾipajso~u a miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk no~u tajwan a ɾəkatəp, nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a patirəŋ i naiko~uran no~u pisəɬ~ɮaɾ no~u kaʡəɬ~ɮəsan no~u tajwan, to~u ħatiniaj miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u pifəɾiħ to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan a makariʡaŋaj, piɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a o~unto~u, mifəɾiħ to~u ħənəŋ o~unto~u ato~u ɾijo~ukan a kiwiko~u. o~u nia sakapo~ut taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan ira ko~u ** a ɾaisaɾ no~u jo~ufajo~uf, i **** miħəʦaan to~una patirəŋ ira ko~u mikiŋkiwaj a wijinħo~u~uj piɾiʦajan ato~u mikiŋkiwaj a tajaɾ. pakajni i patatəko~u to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a matajaɾaj to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a kasakapo~ut, o~u matanəŋaj a ħakasi no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u, patənak to~u to~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, nai kasanijaro~u a piʦo~uʡaj pasajra i matanəŋaj to~u taɾijo~uk a rikəʦ ko~u piʦəkəro~uħ ato~u pikanto~uk. tato~ukəran a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. *.o~u taɾijo~uk a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ o~u nano~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, ʦaaj ko~u kaɾaɾiaʦaan ano~u əʦa o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ; o~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan to~u sapiɬ~ɮo~upo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk a kaʡo~uripan, maŋaʡaj miɾijaŋ to~u misatatiiħaj to~u taɾijo~uk a sarikəʦ ano~u əʦa o~u ħaɾaka, itija ira ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ mikəto~un ato~u mikanto~uk to~u saɾaɾo~umaan no~u sjako~u a patirəŋ miʦo~uwat. *. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw miiŋiraj to~u tataparan a taɾijo~uk a maʡo~urip; tataparan a kinaira o~u mamiɬ~ɮao~uʦ a miħaɬ~ɮo~uj, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tataparan o~u masasiŋaʡajaj ko~u masasitaɬ~ɮiəʦ a miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uo~u to~u no~u sjakaj, kiʦaj, kaki a maʦo~uwat piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan, niħo~usjo~u to~u pipaħapinaŋ to~u kaʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. *.o~u ʦaʦo~uno~uħən no~u
